work_package.title: Prepare Shadow-Mode Pilot Readiness Without Production Claim
work_package.current_state: Shadow-mode preparation path was completed by PR #151 and PR #152 with dry-run stop guards, manual path documentation, and STATUS boundary markers.
work_package.target_state: A controlled shadow-mode preparation path is documented and validated while production, release, pilot, and responsive-correctness claims remain false.

measurable_current_state.statement: Shadow-mode preparation path was completed by PR #151 and PR #152 with dry-run stop guards, manual path documentation, and STATUS boundary markers.
measurable_current_state.measurement: Measured by dry-run validators, STATUS markers, stop conditions, and absence of real submitted evidence.

measurable_target_state.statement: A controlled shadow-mode preparation path is documented and validated while production, release, pilot, and responsive-correctness claims remain false.
measurable_target_state.measurement: Accepted when dry-run validators, docs, fixtures, and STATUS preserve false readiness and production claims.

target_capability.statement: Shadow-mode preparation is deterministic as a blocked readiness path with dry-run validators and explicit stop-condition documentation.
target_capability.measurement: Dry-run validators, stop-condition documentation, and STATUS markers preserve false readiness and production claims.

work_package.expected_project_delta: Repository has a bounded shadow-mode preparation path with dry-run validators, explicit stop conditions, and completion records that cannot authorize pilot execution.
allowed_work: Preserve dry-run readiness outputs and stop-condition diagnostics.
Document operator steps that remain manual and blocked until real gates pass.
Add fixtures proving readiness claims stay false without real evidence.
forbidden_work: Do not create submitted evidence unless explicitly authorized by the repository owner and current Issue #8 submitted-mode contracts.
Do not mutate Issue #8 or mark Issue #8 evidence as satisfied.
Do not run or authorize real pilot execution.
Do not claim production_ready, release_ready, live_render_validated, export_json_validated, accessibility_passed, pixel_perfect, or responsive_correctness_validated.
Do not treat CI success, merged PRs, catalog completion, Work Package completion, or queue completion as domain evidence.
must_deliver: Completed manual/operator guide updates with explicit stop conditions.
Completed STATUS boundary markers that keep pilot execution blocked.
must_preserve: Rolling queue remains a historical reconciled archive, not the execution driver.
Controller selection must come only from planning/EV4_AUTOMATION_WORK_PACKAGE_CATALOG.json.
Quality gates, CI, review, and evidence boundaries remain mandatory.
Technical evidence claims remain false unless real evidence gates pass.
Catalog replenishment is state-driven and must not block active Work Package execution.
Catalog replenishment must respect the single-active-mutation-PR policy.
definition_of_done: The measurable target state is met by schema-backed or validator-backed repository evidence.
The selected PR slice remains reviewable and stays under this Work Package ID.
No submitted evidence, Issue #8 mutation, pilot authorization, or forbidden readiness claim is produced by the Work Package.

split_rule.principle: A Work Package may be large in objective, but each PR must remain reviewable.

allowed_pr_slices.title: readiness dry-run guards
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Harden dry-run readiness and stop-condition checks.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

allowed_pr_slices.title: manual shadow-mode path docs
allowed_pr_slices.objective: Document the blocked preparation path and required evidence gates.
allowed_pr_slices.review_boundary: Reviewable PR slice under the same Work Package ID; no unrelated micro-objective may be introduced.

blocked_if: Real submitted evidence is absent and the slice attempts to authorize live pilot execution.
completion_record_requirements: Record selected Work Package ID and PR slice ID in the PR body.
List files changed, validators changed, and CI commands run.
State commands not run and why.
Record whether catalog replenishment was checked and whether it was non-mutating, same-PR in-scope, or blocked by single-active-PR policy.
Record remaining risks and the next safe human action.
